caption: In the video, a young man is browsing through clothing items in a retail store. He is wearing a pink t-shirt and a light blue cap. The store appears to be an O'Neill shop, as indicated by the prominent branding on the wall. The man is examining a rack of black hoodies, picking up one to inspect it closely. He then moves on to look at other items on the rack, including a plaid shirt. The store is well-lit and features various apparel and accessories displayed on shelves and racks, creating a vibrant shopping environment. The man seems to be carefully considering his options as he continues to browse.
